/usr/bin/ar qc libnetcore.a CMakeFiles/netcore_utils_obj.dir/src/utils/string_util.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_utils_obj.dir/src/utils/thread_util.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_utils_obj.dir/src/utils/time_util.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_thread_obj.dir/src/thread/semaphore.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_thread_obj.dir/src/thread/thread.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_memory_obj.dir/src/memory/stack_pool.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_fiber_obj.dir/src/fiber/fiber.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_fiber_obj.dir/src/fiber/fiber_pool.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_fiber_obj.dir/src/fiber/scheduler.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_fiber_obj.dir/src/fiber/timer.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_fiber_obj.dir/src/fiber/timing_wheel.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_io_obj.dir/src/io/fd_context.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_io_obj.dir/src/io/iomanager.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_io_obj.dir/src/io/hook.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_io_obj.dir/src/io/connect.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_buffer_obj.dir/src/buffer/ring_buffer.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_socket_obj.dir/src/socket/address.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_socket_obj.dir/src/socket/socket.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_log_obj.dir/src/log/level.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_log_obj.dir/src/log/event.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_log_obj.dir/src/log/pattern_layout.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_log_obj.dir/src/log/appender.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_log_obj.dir/src/log/console_appender.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_log_obj.dir/src/log/file_appender.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_log_obj.dir/src/log/log_paths.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_log_obj.dir/src/log/rolling_file_appender.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_log_obj.dir/src/log/async_appender.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_log_obj.dir/src/log/log_runtime.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_log_obj.dir/src/log/appender_registry.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_log_obj.dir/src/log/mdc.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_log_obj.dir/src/log/logger.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_log_obj.dir/src/log/logger_repository.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_config_obj.dir/src/config/config_var.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_config_obj.dir/src/config/config_center.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_config_obj.dir/src/config/property_loader.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_config_obj.dir/src/config/log_config.cc.o CMakeFiles/netcore_config_obj.dir/src/config/config_printer.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libnetcore.a
